launchd - What are the differences between LaunchAgents and ...
On macOS 10.12.5, I only see LaunchAgents in the Users Library directory. Are the agents only invoked if a user is logged in? Yes, LaunchAgents are only invoked when the user logs into a graphical session. LaunchDaemons are typically launched when the system boots and are run outside of a specific user session.
